title: Setting Saver
description: Instantly switch all of your Minecraft settings: controls, video, accessibility, resource packs, and more. Useful for players who frequently have their settings messed up by switching versions.
body:
# **Features**
/saveoptions: Run this to save your current Minecraft settings to the config.

/loadoptions: Takes your saved settings and replaces your current settings; sends error message in chat if nothing is saved.

/loadoptionsnoresource: Same as loadoptions, but does not load resource packs. Loads significantly faster without having to reload textures.
# **Capabilities**

Saves:
- **Enabled Resource Packs**
- **ALL Vanilla Minecraft Keybinds (Yes, this works with custom mouse buttons)**
- **ALL Modded Minecraft Keybinds (Keybinds created by other Fabric mods)**
- After adding or removing mods, save options before loading them again

<details>
<summary>More Miscellaneous Settings</summary>

- FOV
- FOV Effect Scale
- Darkness Effect Scale
- Distortion Effect Scale
- Enchantment Glint Speed
- Enchantment Glint Strength
- GUI Scale
- FPS Limit
- Simulation Distance
- Auto Jump (on/off)
- Rotate Camera With Minecart (on/off)
- Subtitles (on/off)
- Toggle Sneak (on/off)
- Toggle Sprint (on/off)
- Mouse Sensitivity
- Chat Settings

</details>





Feel free to DM me on Discord @hhsubest with any bug reports, suggestions, or questions
